name: #484 · 19c703695a5a784aea6a5a1ae56313ea1bd56f5a · Michał Kruk · test: harden find-scrollable tests with nested, horizontal, ref-based scrolling (#90)

newTests.name: Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > discovery > finds both nested scrollable containers (outer and inner)
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > metadata > returns scroll dimensions with scrollHeight > clientHeight for vertical overflow
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > refs > assigns data-pw-ref DOM attribute matching returned ref
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > scrolling discovered elements via ref > scrolls a discovered element by evaluating scrollTop via ref
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > discovery > finds overflow:auto, overflow-y:scroll, and overflow-x:auto elements
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > refs > assigns unique refs to each scrollable element
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > metadata > captures role and overflow-y CSS value
Integration tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > find_scrollable command > scrolls a discovered element via its ref
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > scrolling discovered elements via ref > scrolls nested inner container independently of outer
Integration tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > find_scrollable command > finds nested containers (both outer and inner)
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > discovery > excludes overflow:hidden and content-fits elements
Integration tests for the sci_eval daemon handler > sci_eval handler > scrollable finds scrollable elements with refs via SCI (issue #90)
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > metadata > returns scrollWidth > clientWidth for horizontal overflow
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > scrolling discovered elements via ref > scrolls horizontal container via ref
Integration tests for the sci_eval daemon handler > sci_eval handler > scrollable returns refs usable for scrolling via SCI (issue #90)
Integration tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > find_scrollable command > finds scrollable elements with refs and metadata
Tests for scrollable element discovery (issue #90) > discovery > returns empty vector on page with no scrollable elements
